phrases.intent_en: Ask where the camera obscura room is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la sala de cámara oscura?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-de es-TAH lah SAH-lah de KAH-mah ra o-SKU-rah?

likely_response.local: Subiendo las escaleras, segunda puerta a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: soo-bee-EHN-doh LAHS eh-skah-LEH-rahs seh-GOON-dah poo-EHR-tah AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: Going up the stairs, second door on the left.

responses.english: Going up the stairs, second door on the left.
responses.phonetic: soo-bee-EHN-doh LAHS eh-skah-LEH-rahs seh-GOON-dah poo-EHR-tah AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: Subiendo las escaleras, segunda puerta a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the viewing platform is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde se encuentra la plataforma de observación?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh seh ehn-KWEHN-trah lah plah-tah-FOHR-mah deh ob-sehr-vah-SYOHN?

likely_response.local: Suba hasta la cima de la torre.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOO-bah AH-stah LAH THEE-mah DEH LAH TOHR-reh
likely_response.translation_en: Go up to the top of the tower.

responses.english: Go up to the top of the tower.
responses.phonetic: SOO-bah AH-stah LAH THEE-mah DEH LAH TOHR-reh
responses.french: Suba hasta la cima de la torre.

phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo comprar las entradas de acceso?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh kohm-PRAR las en-TRAH-dahs deh ak-SEH-soh?

likely_response.local: En la taquilla junto al ascensor antiguo.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah HOON-toh AHL ah-sthehn-SOHR ahn-tee-G-oh
likely_response.translation_en: At the main ticket office, right at the entrance.

responses.english: At the main ticket office, right at the entrance.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah HOON-toh AHL ah-sthehn-SOHR ahn-tee-G-oh
responses.french: En la taquilla junto al ascensor antiguo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find camera obscura show times
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde están los horarios de la cámara oscura?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh eh-STAHN lohs oh-RAH-ree-ohs deh lah KAH-mah-rah oh-SKOO-rah?

likely_response.local: En la taquilla, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office, on the right.

responses.english: At the ticket office, on the right.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: En la taquilla, a la derecha.
